name: Zarya
description: A Support that can enable deadly allies and is good at preventing burst damage.
title: Defender of Russia
info: Aleksandra Zaryanova is one of the world's strongest women and was a promising athlete, but all that changed when the Siberian omnium reawakened. As a soldier in the Russian Defense Force, she now proudly uses her strength to protect the ones she loves.

Zarya.name: Particle Grenade
Zarya.description: Launch a particle grenade that deals 80 (+4% per level) damage to enemies within the area. Deals 50% damage to Structures.  Stores up to 4 charges.

Zarya.name: Personal Barrier
Zarya.description: Gain a Shield that absorbs 560 (+4% per level) damage for 3 seconds.

Zarya.name: Shield Ally
Zarya.description: Grants an allied Hero a Shield that absorbs 420 (+4% per level) damage for 3 seconds.

Zarya.name: Graviton Surge
Zarya.description: Launch a gravity bomb that detonates after 1 second and draws enemy Heroes toward the center for 2.5 seconds. Affected Heroes take 30 (+4% per level) damage a second.

Zarya.name: Expulsion Zone
Zarya.description: Launch a gravity bomb that deals 124 (+4% per level) damage and creates an expulsion zone for 3.5 seconds. Enemies who enter the affected area are knocked back and have their Movement Speed reduced by 50% for 1 second.

Zarya.name: Energy
Zarya.description: Each time Zarya's Personal Barrier or Shield Ally absorbs 9 (+4% per level) damage, her Energy is increased by 1. Each point of Energy increases Zarya's damage by 2%. After 0.5 seconds, Energy decays by 3 per second.

1.name: Demolitions Expert
1.description: Quest: For every 5 enemy Heroes hit by Particle Grenade, its recharge rate lowers by 0.4375 seconds, up to 3.5 seconds.  Reward: Once Particle Grenade has hit 40 enemy Heroes, its radius is increased by 15%.

1.name: Together We Are Strong
1.description: For 3 seconds after gaining Shield Ally, every 5.35 (+4% per level) damage done by the bearer contributes 1 Energy to Zarya, up to 40 Energy per Shield.

1.name: Feel the Heat
1.description: Zarya's Basic Attack deals 50% additional damage to enemies in melee range. While above 40 Energy, Zarya's Basic Attack size is increased by 35%.

1.name: Maximum Charge
1.description: Regen Globes now instantly grant 20 Energy.  Quest: Spend 150 seconds at or above 50 Energy.  Reward: Gain an additional 20 maximum Energy.

4.name: I Am the Strongest
4.description: Personal Barrier absorbs an additional 140 (+4% per level) damage.  Passive: Damage absorbed by Zarya's Shields contributes 20% more Energy.

4.name: Give Me Twenty
4.description: Quest: Regeneration Globes increase Shield Ally absorb amount by 15, up to 300 permanently.  Reward: After collecting 20 Regen Globes, permanently reduce the cooldown of Shield Ally by 2 seconds.

4.name: Speed Barrier
4.description: Shield Ally increases the allied Hero's Movement Speed by 50% for the duration.

4.name: Defensive Shielding
4.description: Upon expiration or breaking, Personal Barrier and Shield Ally grant 75 Physical Armor against the next 2 Hero Basic Attacks for 6 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 75%.

7.name: Pinpoint Accuracy
7.description: Particle Grenade deals 25 (+4% per level) more damage and Slows Movement Speed by 25% for 2 seconds to enemies hit by the center of the blast.

7.name: Deep Burn
7.description: Hitting a Hero with Particle Grenade causes Basic Attacks against them to generate 2 Energy. Lasts 4 seconds.

7.name: Explosive Barrier
7.description: Upon expiration or breaking, Personal Barrier explodes, dealing 110 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies.

10.name: Graviton Surge
10.description: Launch a gravity bomb that detonates after 1 second and draws enemy Heroes toward the center for 2.5 seconds. Affected Heroes take 30 (+4% per level) damage a second.

10.name: Expulsion Zone
10.description: Launch a gravity bomb that deals 124 (+4% per level) damage and creates an expulsion zone for 3.5 seconds. Enemies who enter the affected area are knocked back and have their Movement Speed reduced by 50% for 1 second.

13.name: Unstoppable Competitor
13.description: Personal Barrier makes Zarya Unstoppable for up to 2 seconds.

13.name: Spell Barrier
13.description: Upon expiration or breaking, Personal Barrier grants Zarya 75 Spell Armor for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken from Abilities by 75%.

13.name: Endurance Training
13.description: While at or above 75 Energy, Zarya gains 20 Armor, reducing all damage taken by 20%.

13.name: Pain is Temporary
13.description: Activate to consume all Energy and gain a Shield that absorbs 0.8% of Zarya's maximum Health per Energy consumed and lasts for 3 seconds. Zarya may only have one personal Shield active on herself at a time.

16.name: Cleansing Shield
16.description: Causes Shield Ally to remove all disabling effects and reduces its cooldown by 3 seconds.

16.name: Gain Train
16.description: Shield Ally now grants an untalented Shield to a nearby ally upon impact.

16.name: Born in Battle
16.description: While at or above 75 Energy, Zarya's cooldowns regenerate 25% faster.

20.name: Gravity Kills
20.description: Increases Graviton Surge's duration by 1 second and it Silences Heroes caught in its area.

20.name: Clear Out
20.description: Reduce Expulsion Zone's cooldown by 25 seconds and increase its duration by 1.5 seconds.

20.name: Grenadier
20.description: All Particle Grenade charges are returned at once.

20.name: Unyielding Defender
20.description: Activate to reset the cooldown of Personal Barrier and Shield Ally.

tooltipMarkup.ZaryaDeepBurn: Hitting a Hero with Particle Grenade causes Basic Attacks against them to generate <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZaryaDeepBurnImpactUpdateCatalog,CatalogModifications[0].Value"/></c> Energy. Lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZaryaParticleGrenadeDeepBurnTalentMarker,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaDefensiveShieldingTalent: Upon expiration or breaking, Personal Barrier and Shield Ally grant <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TalentBucketBlock,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Basic]"/></c> Physical Armor against the next <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZaryaDefensiveShieldingApplyBehavior,Count"/></c> Hero Basic Attacks for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZaryaDefensiveShieldingApplyBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds, reducing the damage taken by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TalentBucketBlock,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Basic]"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaEnergy: Each time Zarya's Personal Barrier or Shield Ally absorbs <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZaryaEnergyBoostDecay,Period" precision="0"/></c> damage, her Energy is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c>. Each point of Energy increases Zarya's damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c>. After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZaryaEnergyDecayCountdown,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds, Energy decays by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZaryaEnergyBoostDecay,Modification.VitalRegenArray[Energy]*(-1)" precision="1" player="0"/></c> per second.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaEnergyBornInBattleTalent: While at or above <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Validator,ZaryaEnergyGT74,Value+1"/></c> Energy, Zarya's cooldowns regenerate <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZaryaEnergyBornInBattle,Modification.RateMultiplierArray[Cooldown]-1*100"/>%</c> faster.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaEnergyEnduranceTrainingTalent: While at or above <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Validator,ZaryaEnergyGT74,Value+1"/></c> Energy, Zarya gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZaryaEnergyEnduranceTraining,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor, reducing all damage taken by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZaryaEnergyEnduranceTraining,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaEnergyMaximumChargeTalent: Regen Globes now instantly grant Energy.Quest: Spend seconds at or above Energy.Reward: Gain an additional maximum Energy.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaExpulsionZone: Launch a gravity bomb that deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZaryaExpulsionZoneDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and creates an expulsion zone for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Effect,ZaryaExpulsionZoneMissileImpactCreatePersistent,PeriodCount+1)*Effect,ZaryaExpulsionZoneMissileImpactCreatePersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]" precision="1"player="0"/></c> seconds. Enemies who enter the affected area are knocked back and have their Movement Speed reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZaryaExpulsionZoneSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*(-100)"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZaryaExpulsionZoneSlow,Duration" precision="2"player="0"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaExpulsionZoneClearOutTalent: Reduce Expulsion Zone's cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,ZaryaExpulsionZoneClearOut,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds and increase its duration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZaryaExpulsionZoneMissileImpactCreatePersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]*(Talent,ZaryaExpulsionZoneClearOut,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value)"precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaGravitonSurge: Launch a gravity bomb that detonates after <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second and draws enemy Heroes toward the center for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds. Affected Heroes take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZaryaGravitonSurgeDamage,Amount*2"/></c> damage a second.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaGravitonSurgeGravityKillsTalent: Increases Graviton Surge's duration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,ZaryaGravitonSurgeGravityKills,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"/></c> second and it Silences Heroes caught in its area.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaPainIsTemporaryTalent: Activate to consume all Energy and gain a Shield that absorbs <c val="#TooltipNumbers">0.8%</c> of Zarya's maximum Health per Energy consumed and lasts for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZaryaPainIsTemporary,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds. Zarya may only have one personal Shield active on herself at a time.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaParticleGrenade: Launch a particle grenade that deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZaryaParticleGrenadeDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies within the area. Deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> damage to Structures.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,ZaryaParticleGrenade,Cost.Charge.CountMax"/></c> charges.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaParticleGrenadeDemolitionsExpertTal: Quest: For every 5 enemy Heroes hit by Particle Grenade, its recharge rate lowers by seconds, up to seconds.Reward: Once Particle Grenade has hit enemy Heroes, its radius is increased by 15%.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaParticleGrenadeGrenadierTalent: All Particle Grenade charges are returned at once.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaParticleGrenadePinpointAccuracyTale: Particle Grenade deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZaryaParticleGrenadePinpointAccuracyDamage,Amount - Effect,ZaryaParticleGrenadeDamage,Amount"/></c> more damage and Slows Movement Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZaryaParticleGrenadePinpointAccuracySlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*(-100)"player="0"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZaryaParticleGrenadePinpointAccuracySlow,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds to enemies hit by the center of the blast.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaPersonalBarrier: Gain a Shield that absorbs <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZaryaPersonalBarrier,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit"/></c> damage for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZaryaPersonalBarrier,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaPersonalBarrierExplosiveBarrierTale: Upon expiration or breaking, Personal Barrier explodes, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZaryaPersonalBarrierExplosiveBarrierDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to nearby enemies.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaPersonalBarrierIAmTheStrongestTalen: Personal Barrier absorbs an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZaryaPersonalBarrierIAmTheStrongest,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit-Behavior,ZaryaPersonalBarrier,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit"/></c> damage. <n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Damage absorbed by Zarya's Shields contributes <c val="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> more Energy.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaPersonalBarrierSpellBarrierTalent: Upon expiration or breaking, Personal Barrier grants Zarya <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZaryaPersonalBarrierSpellBarrier,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/></c> Spell Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZaryaPersonalBarrierSpellBarrier,Duration"/></c> seconds, reducing the damage taken from Abilities by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZaryaPersonalBarrierSpellBarrier,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaPersonalBarrierUnstoppableCompetito: Personal Barrier makes Zarya Unstoppable for up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZaryaPersonalBarrierUnstoppableCompetitor,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaShieldAlly: Grants an allied Hero a Shield that absorbs <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZaryaShieldAlly,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit"/></c> damage for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZaryaShieldAlly,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaShieldAllyCleansingShieldTalent: Causes Shield Ally to remove all disabling effects and reduces its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,ZaryaShieldAllyCleansingShield,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaShieldAllyGainTrainTalent: Shield Ally now grants an untalented Shield to a nearby ally upon impact.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaShieldAllyGiveMeTwentyTalent: Quest: Regeneration Globes increase Shield Ally absorb amount by 15, up to permanently. Reward: After collecting 20 Regen Globes, permanently reduce the cooldown of Shield Ally by seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaShieldAllySpeedBarrierTalent: Shield Ally increases the allied Hero's Movement Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,ZaryaShieldAllySpeedBarrier,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value*100" precision="2"player="0"/>%</c> for the duration.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaShieldAllyTogetherWeAreStrongTalent: For <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZaryaShieldAllyTogetherWeAreStrongTalentBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds after gaining Shield Ally, every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZaryaEnergyBoostDecay,Period/1.75"precision="2"/></c> damage done by the bearer contributes <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Energy to Zarya, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> Energy per Shield.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaUnyieldingDefenderTalent: Activate to reset the cooldown of Personal Barrier and Shield Ally.
tooltipMarkup.ZaryaWeaponFeelTheHeatTalent: Zarya's Basic Attack deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Effect,ZaryaWeaponFeelTheHeatDamage,Amount/Effect,ZaryaWeaponDamage,Amount)-1*10)" />0%</c> additional damage to enemies in melee range. While above <c val="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> Energy, Zarya's Basic Attack size is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Effect,ZaryaWeaponToTheLimitSearch,AreaArray[0].RectangleWidth)-(Effect,ZaryaWeaponSplashTargetSearch,AreaArray[0].RectangleWidth)*100"/>%</c>.
